# Colima.run Docs (Scraped)

The colima.run website docs are NOT in a public repository.
They are maintained privately by abiosoft.

These markdown files were scraped from https://colima.run/docs/ on 2026-04-24.

## Pages

- [Getting Started](getting-started.md)
- [Installation](installation.md)
- [Commands](commands.md)
- [Configuration](configuration.md)
- [Runtimes](runtimes.md)
- [Profiles](profiles.md)
- [AI Workloads](ai-workloads.md)
- [FAQ](faq.md)

## Source

The Colima Git repo (`vendor/colima/`) contains only 3 doc files:
- `docs/FAQ.md` (older version)
- `docs/INSTALL.md`
- `docs/CONTRIBUTE.md`

The full documentation at colima.run is generated from a private source.
